name: Brown Rice with Sesame Fried Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the rice three times and boil in plenty of salted water until tender.
2. While the rice is cooking, wash and prepare the vegetables: slice the green onions finely, cut each radish in half, cut the carrot diagonally, then cut each slice into strips. Slice the cucumber not too thinly, and cut each slice into four pieces.
3. Heat oil in a wok or pan and stir-fry the garlic for 30 seconds.
4. Add the prepared vegetables and stir-fry for 3 minutes.
5. Add the sesame seeds after 2 minutes of cooking the vegetables.
6. When the rice is tender, drain it and stir in the fried vegetables and sesame seeds.
7. Stir in the sesame paste, soy sauce, and lemon juice to taste.
8. Serve hot with sesame tahini to taste.
From Chinese Vegetarian Cookery by Jack Santa Maria
